LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AFFHOLDER, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT INCORPORATES THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE OF THE CONTRACT BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND THE PRIME CONTRACTOR AND ELIMINATES ANY AMBIGUITY IN PARAGRAPH 13.9, A WRITTEN DOCUMENT THAT, AT A MINIMUM, REFLECTS THE CORE AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. THE PARTIES, BY THEIR CONDUCT HAVE WAIVED THE CONDITION OF MEDIATION. (COURT RULED ON BOTH DEFENDANT AFFHOLDER, INC.'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE AND ON PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO DECLARATION OF JAMES PEREGOY, BOTH ORDERS SIGNED.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NTK CONSTRUCTION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION IS GRANTED FOR THE REASONS STATED IN CONNECTION WITH THE COURT'S RULING ON OCTOBER 10, 2008 WITH RESPECT TO AFFHOLDER, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. - PLAINTIFF'S CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT INCORPORATES THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE OF THE CONTRACT BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND THE PRIME CONTRACTOR AND ELIMINATES ANY AMBIGUITY IN PARAGRAPH 13.9, A WRITTEN DOCUMENT THAT, AT A MINIMUM, REFLECTS THE CORE AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. THE PARTIES, BY THEIR CONDUCT HAVE WAIVED THE CONDITION OF MEDIATION. - PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Completion Of Arbitation
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NTK CONSTRUCTION, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY ACTION PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION is granted for the reasons stated in connection with the Court's ruling on October 10, 2008 with respect to Affholder, Inc's motion to compel arbitration. - Plaintiff's contract with defendant incorporates the arbitration clause of the contract between defendant and the prime contractor and eliminates any ambiguity in paragraph 13.9, a written document that, at a minimum, reflects the core agreement between plaintiff and defendant. The parties, by their conduct have waived the condition of mediation. - Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Ntc Of Applications And Applications Of Mark Menghini And Shenna Bradshaw To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AFFHOLDER, INC.'S Verified Applications Of Mark Menghini And Shenna Bradshaw To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice For Defendant Affholder, Inc.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. Counsel to pay the required fee to the State Bar. [Mark Menghini, Esq. And Shenna Bradshaw, Esq. of Greensfelder, Hemker & Gale, P.C., 10 South Broadway, Suite 2000, St. Louis, Missouri, 63102, tel.#314/241-9090.] (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Ntc And Mtn To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT AFFHOLDER, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. Plaintiff's contract with defendant incorporates the arbitration clause of the contract between defendant and the prime contractor and eliminates any ambiguity in paragraph 13.9, a written document that, at a minimum, reflects the core agreement between plaintiff and defendant. The parties, by their conduct have waived the condition of mediation. (Court ruled on both defendant Affholder, Inc.'s objections to plaintiff's evidence and on plaintiff's objection to declaration of James Peregoy, both orders signed.) (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
